commits.subject: Fix P0 + 3 resilience improvements (morning fixes)
Dashboard: enrich catalog with dept names (deptSubName from process5)
Dashboard: searchable catalog browser on /scrape
Dashboard: RSS Catalog Tracker on /scrape page
progress_log: N+16 (Option A + B + Hybrid catalog)
Hybrid catalog growth: probe 50/run + slow safe batch scan
Option B: shrink scraper keywords 30 -> 4 (RSS handles rest)
Option A: wire RSS queue ingest into 02:00 collect pipeline
RSS cron: drop .bat wrapper, use pythonw directly (silent)
RSS cron: hide CMD window (pythonw + Hidden task)
Phase 1.5: RSS queue ingestion + 30-min cron (N+15b)
Phase 1 RSS-First Pipeline MVP (N+15)
Dashboard: error boundaries + mobile polish (N+14d)
Dashboard: HTTP Basic Auth via middleware (N+14c)
Dashboard: Vercel Blob real-time snapshot (Option A, N+14b)
Dashboard: 5 pages + Vercel deploy + pipeline integration (N+14)
Dashboard MVP D1-D3: data extractor + Next.js Overview page
EGP RSS feeds POC verified + 14 API catalog (N+13)
CGD Open Data API discovery (N+12) — endpoint + probe + datasets
Progress log: N+10 (4 fixes ca0474a) + N+11 (Cloudflare stealth d77e159)
Scraper: Cloudflare stealth (deep research 2026-05-17)
Pipeline: 4 fixes จากรีวิว pipeline 17/05/2026
Scraper v2: research-driven improvements (Nutch + industry patterns)
Scraper: incremental mode (95% speedup on typical days)
LINE Notify: Style A redesign — clean card + Google Sheet links
Classifier: track transitions between sheets (snapshot diff)
roadmap: SaaS competitive strategy vs G-LEAD (4 pillars + pricing)
patch_deadlines: ตัด ambiguous keywords ป้องกัน hit วันรับฟังผิด
patch_deadlines: stepId-based filter + retry 2x + integrate to collect.bat
Split pipeline: collect at 02:00 + notify at 06:00 sharp
Pipeline: focus on LINE notify reliability (skip risky steps)
Phase B + Phase 3: bid_history feature + updated Pipeline 8-step bat
Add CLAUDE.md — project rules for Discord notify + progress logging
Classifier: active_bidding ต้อง deadline >= today (ป้องกัน stale M03/S01)
Phase A: 6-sheet stepId-driven Classifier + cancelled detection
Plan: add Phase B bid_history feature (competitive intelligence)
Research: complete eGP stepId catalog + new classifier plan
Heal 50 bad winners + investigate cancelled-in-active bug
Redesign: 4-sheet lifecycle (tor_review + active + pending + awarded)
Add eGP API live refresh + integrate into Pipeline (step 4/8)
Fix schema drift: heal 1,300 misaligned rows in all_jobs
Initial commit: Bid Master System
